continuation_of: GFX-PKT-006C-R4-R1 — Exact-Instant Representation and Evidence Factuality Remediation v0.1 (merged via PR #35 into main 7cb6192)
authorising_records: GFX-EVD-006C-R4-R1 — PM Reconciliation of Merged Head and Remaining Constructor/Evidence Defects v0.1
GFX-ADR-DATA-007 — Retain PR #35 Merge and Remediate Constructor/Evidence Forward v0.1

defects_corrected.unicode_digit_constructor_defect: UtcInstant.__init__ validated fractional digits with str.isdigit(), which returns True for non-ASCII digit characters (Arabic-Indic, extended Arabic-Indic, Devanagari, fullwidth, superscript, mixed). A directly constructed instant could therefore hold out-of-contract fractional state whose lexicographic (code-point) comparison is not the intended numeric order. Corrected: an explicit ASCII membership test (frozenset('0123456789').issuperset(frac_digits)) admits only empty or normalized ASCII [0-9]+ state; isdigit()/isdecimal()/isnumeric() are not used; no int/float is formed; the parser path is unaffected.
defects_corrected.epoch_domain_defect: UtcInstant.__init__ accepted any non-boolean integer epoch, including instants outside the canonical parser's representable year 0001-9999 range. Corrected: module constants MIN_CANONICAL_EPOCH_S (0001-01-01T00:00:00Z = -62135596800) and MAX_CANONICAL_EPOCH_S (9999-12-31T23:59:59Z = 253402300799), derived once via calendar.timegm over an integer time tuple (no float), bound direct construction; both boundaries are accepted and one second beyond either is rejected through ContractError.
defects_corrected.r4_r1_file_count_overstatement: The R4-R1 evidence's actual_results prose said '11 authorised files' for the R4-R1 incremental diff while its own files_modified (11) + files_added (1) lists, and the independently verified diff (6cedad0..660e086), total 12 files. This manifest records the corrected count of 12. The R4-R1 manifest's prior bytes are preserved; only an additive superseded_by_r4_r2_evidence pointer is added.
defects_corrected.stale_acceptance_current_state_claims: Supersedes the prior PM acceptance/current-state claims that predate the PR #35 merge: canonical main is now at/after 7cb6192 and repository records are realigned to the bounded R4-R2 lifecycle without asserting real capability or a point-in-time PR status.

r4_r1_evidence_change: pointer-only: a single additive superseded_by_r4_r2_evidence key (plus its comma) is added to GFX-EVD-006C-R4-R1-exact-instant-factuality.json; no other byte or claim of that historical manifest is altered.

remediation_results.ascii_fractional_state: Constructor admits frac_digits only as '' (exact whole second) or a normalized ASCII [0-9]+ string whose final character is not '0'; the check is an explicit frozenset membership test walked linearly over the string, never str.isdigit()/isdecimal()/isnumeric(), and forms no int/float.
remediation_results.unicode_digit_rejection: Arabic-Indic '١', extended Arabic-Indic '۱', Devanagari '१', fullwidth '１', superscript '²' and ASCII/Unicode mixtures all raise ContractError at construction, so non-ASCII code points can never enter an instant value or its comparison state.
remediation_results.canonical_epoch_domain: Direct construction is bounded to [MIN_CANONICAL_EPOCH_S, MAX_CANONICAL_EPOCH_S] = [-62135596800, 253402300799]; both boundaries are accepted, one second beyond either and further out-of-range integers raise ContractError, while booleans and non-integers continue to raise ContractError; parser-produced timestamps (4-digit year, datetime.fromisoformat domain) remain within these bounds and are unaffected.
remediation_results.preserved_invariants: Arbitrary-length parsing/ordering (incl. 10,000-digit fractions), exact comparison to integer epoch seconds, immutability (__setattr__/__delattr__ raise) and deliberate unhashability (__hash__ = None) are unchanged; no timestamp regex, schema, dependency, Makefile, CI workflow, timezone, storage, quarantine, publication or agent-client code was touched.
remediation_results.use_sites_transparent: timezone gate, tools/research_smoke point-in-time ordering and storage manifest-instant parsing continue to consume the value only for comparison; all remain green.

tests.constructor_invariant_matrix: TestUtcInstantConstructorInvariant (new): normalized ASCII fractions '1'/'01'/'0001'/'' accepted; trailing-zero forms '10'/'0'/'100'/'10000' rejected; Arabic-Indic/extended Arabic-Indic/Devanagari/fullwidth/superscript and mixed Unicode digit strings rejected; valid ASCII direct-constructor ordering equals parsed-timestamp ordering; a Unicode digit can no longer enter comparison state; earliest/latest canonical epoch bounds accepted; one second outside either bound rejected via ContractError; booleans/floats/strings/None as epoch rejected; a 10,000-digit ASCII fraction still constructs directly and orders after the whole second.
tests.regression: All prior R4/R4-R1 arbitrary-length, immutability, unhashability, integer-epoch equality, quarantine-provenance, publication, timezone, research, storage, concurrency, HTTP, security and Parquet/DuckDB tests remain green; research and market-data smokes PASS and are byte-for-byte deterministic across two runs.
